toast.title: Flerapii shielded bypass helper (temporary window)
toast.body:
This page was opened automatically by Flerapii to pass protection pages (e.g., Cloudflare challenges) and obtain the required cookies/session.

It’s necessary so Flerapii can make successful requests and detect data on protected sites.

If a verification step appears, complete it in this window; once passed, Flerapii continues and this window may close automatically.
